subcodes.first_line: By the life of God! The people of Iran are captivated by vain imaginings, though the horizons of every land be illumined with the light of the Sun of justice and certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله اهل ایران باوهام مانوسند اگر آفاق هر مملکتی بانوار نیر عدل و ایقان
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @suffering and imprisonment
